content:
I'm an LIC agent, so you might expect me to say LIC wins every time. But that's not how I advise families. The right insurer depends on what you're buying. Let me give you the honest picture.

Claim Settlement Ratio (2024-25): LIC settled 98.76% of individual death claims. SBI Life settled 97.3%. Both are excellent. In practical terms, the difference is small. A genuine claim at either company will almost certainly be paid.

Government backing: LIC is backed by the Government of India. Its claim liability is ultimately sovereign. SBI Life is a joint venture between State Bank of India and BNP Paribas Cardif. SBI holds 69% and is itself a government bank. Both are extremely safe, but LIC's sovereign backing is unmatched.

Product range: LIC is stronger in traditional endowment, whole life, and money-back plans. It has limited but solid ULIP offerings. SBI Life has a broader ULIP range with more fund choices and better online experience for ULIP investors. SBI Life's Smart Wealth Plan and eShield Next are competitive digital products.

Agent network: LIC has over 1.35 million agents across India, including in every tehsil and village in eastern UP. SBI Life's reach is strong in urban areas but thinner in places like Padrauna, Kushinagar, or Maharajganj. If you want a local advisor who knows your area, LIC wins on ground coverage.

Premium rates: For pure term insurance, both are competitive. SBI Life's eShield Next is often slightly cheaper than LIC's Tech Term for the same cover and term.

My verdict: For traditional savings plans and endowment products, LIC. For ULIPs and digital-first products, SBI Life is worth considering. For term insurance, compare both and pick the lower premium. Call me at 9415313434 and I'll run a specific comparison for the product you have in mind.

Use our free [Premium Calculator](/calculators/premium) to compare term plan costs.
contentHi:
मैं LIC एजेंट हूं, लेकिन यहाँ ईमानदार तुलना:

क्लेम सेटलमेंट: LIC 98.76%, SBI Life 97.3% — दोनों उत्कृष्ट।

सरकारी समर्थन: LIC भारत सरकार समर्थित, SBI Life (SBI 69%) — दोनों सुरक्षित।

उत्पाद: LIC पारंपरिक योजनाओं में बेहतर। SBI Life ULIP में।

नेटवर्क: LIC पूर्वी UP हर जगह। SBI Life शहरी क्षेत्रों में मजबूत।

निर्णय: पारंपरिक योजना = LIC। ULIP = SBI Life भी देखें। टर्म = दोनों तुलना करें। 9415313434 पर कॉल करें।
